greeting.title: Greeting
hero.headline: Suseong Agricultural Corporation
hero.intro: Founded on OnEIO (Bio Sulfur), a new material pending substance registration, we strengthen the fundamental competitiveness of Korea's agriculture, livestock, and fisheries industries while providing consumers with healthier food.
field.agri_desc: Suseong fertilizer improves soil and strengthens crops' natural immunity, preventing pests and dramatically improving yield and quality.
field.livestock_desc: Suseong feed additives fundamentally strengthen livestock immunity and improve gut health, reducing antibiotic use while raising productivity and product quality.
field.aqua_desc: Suseong's aquaculture feed additive is an eco-friendly alternative to antibiotics that maximizes disease resistance in farmed species and improves feed efficiency.

archive.desc: Certificates, test reports, and high-resolution images are available for download in the Resource Center.
